task: Check the status of bus S92 for any disruptions on new.mta.info.
final_result_response:
I checked the service status for bus S92 on new.mta.info (https://www.mta.info/alerts?selectedRoutes=S92).

🚌 Bus S92 — Service Status (as of March 24, 2026):

✅ No Disruptions or Planned Service Changes

The MTA alerts page shows NO active alerts, delays, disruptions, or planned service changes for the S92 Staten Island bus route. The S92 appears to be operating on its normal schedule with no issues reported at this time.

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user wants to check if bus route S92 has any service disruptions on new.mta.info. Successful completion means navigating to the MTA site, finding the S92 route status, and reporting whether there are any alerts or disruptions.

**Output Assessment:** The agent reported that S92 has no active disruptions or planned service changes. It navigated to https://www.mta.info/alerts?selectedRoutes=S92 and confirmed the route is operating normally.

**Evidence:** Step files confirm: (1) The agent opened the "Select bus routes" modal on the MTA alerts page, (2) clicked "Staten Island" to filter routes, (3) found and selected S92 [element 4366], (4) clicked the "Select" button which navigated to the exact URL `https://www.mta.info/alerts?selectedRoutes=S92`, and (5) Step 27's browser_analyze_state confirmed "no planned service changes" for S92. Execution integrity is healthy with no browser errors.

**Summary:** The agent successfully navigated the MTA alerts page, selected the S92 Staten Island bus route via the route filter, and confirmed no disruptions were shown. Step files provide direct evidence of each interaction and the final status check.
